jobs.name: all-project-watchlists
jobs.description: Sync all configured project watchlists, keep running across project failures, and prepare promotion packets.

jobs.name: eventbear-worker-apply
jobs.command: npm run automation:run -- --project eventbear-worker --automation-job eventbear-worker-apply --promotion-mode apply --automation-re-evaluate-limit 20 --automation-lock-timeout-minutes 180
jobs.description: Run the full intake, re-evaluate and promotion pipeline for EventBaer Worker.
